Class BudgetCycle

java.lang.Object
models.BudgetCycle
public class BudgetCycle extends Object
Represents a budgeting cycle for the user. A budget cycle stores the total allowance, cycle duration, and remaining balance.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BudgetCycle(int id, double allowance, Date start, Date end, double remaining)
    Creates a new budget cycle.

  • Constructor Details

    • BudgetCycle

      public BudgetCycle(int id, double allowance, Date start, Date end, double remaining)
      Creates a new budget cycle.
      Parameters:
      id - unique budget cycle identifier
      allowance - total allowance assigned to the cycle
      start - start date of the cycle
      end - end date of the cycle
      remaining - remaining balance in the cycle

      Returns the budget cycle identifier.

      Returns the end date of the cycle.

      public void setTotalAllowance(double l)
      Updates the total allowance.
      Parameters:
      l - new total allowance

    • setStartDate

      public void setEndDate(Date d)
